title: centranthus nevadensis subsp. atlanticus
intro: Centranthus nevadensis subsp. atlanticus, also known as the Atlantic valerian or mountain bluets, is a flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to calm nervous anxiety and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Centranthus nevadensis subsp. atlanticus include reducing stress and promoting a good night's sleep, as well as providing relief from anxiety and restlessness. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
